h1: How LPS reduced their manufacturing costs by 50% with instant Design for Manufacturing feedback.

headings.text: How LPS reduced their manufacturing costs by 50% with instant Design for Manufacturing feedback.
Closing in on a tight deadline and limited budget

images.alt: CNC machining, 3D printing and sheet metal fabrication parts
Kepler satellite image in orbit around the earth
Close up image of CNC machining material
Close up image of Hubs logo object
Illustration of the Hubs 2019 student grant

meta_description: As LPS perfected their LaserTrain design, the team found themselves closing in on a tight deadline and limited budget. By simply uploading their designs for a CNC machining quote, they could instantly check their parts for issues that made them difficult or more expensive to produce.

sections.heading: Laser Precision Solutions (LPS)
sections.text: As LPS perfected their LaserTrain design, the team found themselves closing in on a tight deadline and limited budget. By simply uploading their designs for a CNC machining quote, they could instantly check their parts for issues that made them difficult or more expensive to produce. Laser Precision Solutions (LPS) Anyone who travels by train is familiar with delays. Track contamination such as rust, oil and most notoriously autumn leaves cause the tracks to become slippery. This decreases acceleration and leads to an array of safety issues and increased maintenance. Amsterdam-based LPS has developed the state-of-the-art solution which efficiently cleans the track, the LaserTrain. A few ded...
